courseTitle: Business, Ethics, Accessibility, and Player Research
title: User Research Instrument Game
genericDescription: Design a game to answer a research question; build observation, survey, and A/B testing tools; separate findings from impressions.
specificDescription: Build a game and run a small study with at least five participants. The study must include either an A/B-tested tutorial, difficulty variant, UI variant, or onboarding variant. Submit the game, protocol, consent script, observation sheet, segmentation method, and findings summary.
gradingRubric: 25 pts game suitability; 25 pts research protocol and segmentation; 20 pts findings quality; 15 pts ethical handling; 15 pts reflection.
